entries.title: voice-command-hotkeys
entries.summary: Added custom hotkey input component and voice command execution that speaks action names to trigger them immediately

entries.title: fix-chrome-profile-chooser
entries.summary: Fixed Chrome profile chooser modal not appearing and added number key shortcuts (1-9) for instant profile selection
entries.problem: Profile chooser modal never appeared despite profiles being found - window.show() exception caught by wrong try-catch block caused fallthrough to open URL without modal
entries.fix: Separated try-catch blocks so window errors don't mask profile errors, set React state before window operations, increased z-index to 9999

entries.title: macos-port-plan
entries.summary: Created detailed macOS port planning document with implementation tasks for cross-platform support

entries.title: split-wrapup-test-protocol
entries.summary: Split wrapup into test-protocol (build/install/launch) and wrapup (document/commit) commands for better workflow control

entries.title: optimize-wrapup-workflow
entries.summary: Improved wrapup workflow with git push fix, release build extraction, and step reordering for fail-fast efficiency

entries.title: nsis-delete-old-shortcut
entries.summary: Added NSIS pre-install hook to delete old desktop shortcut before reinstall creates a new one

entries.title: fix-voice-command-fuzzy-match
entries.summary: Fixed voice command review window not working and boosted fuzzy match confidence scores for reliable auto-execution
entries.problem: Voice review window showed Loading forever due to missing Vite build entry, and confidence scores were too low causing review window to appear when it should auto-execute
entries.fix: Added voice-review.html to vite.config.ts build inputs, added defensive timeout/escape handlers to VoiceReviewPanel, and boosted fuzzy match confidence ranges from 30-80% to 50-95% for word overlap and 18-60% to 40-85% for Levenshtein

entries.title: fix-profile-chooser-topmost
entries.summary: Fixed Chrome profile chooser appearing behind other windows by applying Win32 topmost subclass to main window while modal is open

entries.title: fix-profile-chooser-topmost-window
entries.summary: Fixed Profile Chooser appearing behind other windows by creating it as a separate Tauri window with Win32 topmost subclass, following the same pattern as the working recording overlay
entries.problem: Profile Chooser modal was inside main window and Windows Focus Stealing Prevention blocked it from appearing on top of other applications
entries.fix: Created profile-chooser as independent Tauri window with alwaysOnTop and Win32 subclass applied at startup, same architecture as recording overlay

entries.title: webhook-url-actions
entries.summary: Extended Webhook Actions to support URL and SMART_URL modes that open URLs in Chrome or perform Google searches from highlighted text

entries.title: unify-prompt-action-dropdown
entries.summary: Unified prompt actions into the Hotkey Actions dropdown and increased window sizes for better usability
entries.problem: Prompt Actions were in a separate hidden section requiring scrolling, and windows were too small
entries.fix: Added PROMPT as an action type in the existing dropdown alongside POST/GET/URL/Smart URL, removed the separate section, and increased main window to 500x650 and settings modal to max-w-xl

entries.title: prompt-actions-hotkey-llm
entries.summary: Added Prompt Actions feature for hotkey-triggered LLM transforms with stored prompts, bypassing webhooks and voice

entries.title: file-based-settings-persistence
entries.summary: Moved all user settings (hotkeys, webhook actions, preferences) from localStorage to file-based config.json to survive app reinstalls

entries.title: chrome-profile-chooser-for-url-hotkeys
entries.summary: Added Chrome profile chooser for URL hotkeys - when enabled, shows modal to pick which Chrome profile (Work/Personal/etc) to open the URL in

entries.title: debug-hidden-instance
entries.summary: Debugged why new URL action types were not visible - killed hidden SpeakEasy instance from previous build that was blocking dev server startup
entries.problem: Dev server kept exiting immediately with code 0 due to single-instance plugin detecting existing process
entries.fix: Used taskkill to terminate hidden speakeasy.exe process running in system tray

entries.title: fix-profile-chooser-zorder
entries.summary: Fixed Chrome profile chooser modal appearing behind other windows by bringing main window to foreground when showing the modal

entries.title: fix-overlay-zorder-subclassing
entries.summary: Fixed recording overlay z-order issue using Windows window subclassing to intercept WM_WINDOWPOSCHANGING and force HWND_TOPMOST
entries.problem: Recording overlay window disappeared behind other windows despite alwaysOnTop setting - previous fix attempts using SetWindowPos were overridden by other apps
entries.fix: Implemented window subclassing via SetWindowSubclass to intercept WM_WINDOWPOSCHANGING messages and force HWND_TOPMOST before Windows processes z-order changes - this prevents other apps from overriding the topmost status

entries.title: fix-claude-code-notification-hooks
entries.summary: Fixed Claude Code notification sounds by changing invalid Notification hook to valid PermissionRequest and Stop hooks
entries.problem: User had configured a Notification hook which is not a valid Claude Code hook event type so no sounds played
entries.fix: Changed hook event type from Notification to PermissionRequest and Stop which are valid hook events

entries.title: 2025-12-16: Fixed Duplicate Process Issue with Single-Instance Plugin
entries.problem: Two separate `SpeakEasy.exe` processes appeared in Windows Task Manager, causing resource waste and user confusion.

entries.title: implement-always-on-top-status-bar
entries.summary: Implemented floating always-on-top status bar in bottom-right corner with click-through, auto-repositioning, and cross-platform support
entries.problem: Status bar was only visible when all windows minimized, not appearing above other apps
entries.fix: Created dedicated transparent window with alwaysOnTop, visibleOnAllWorkspaces, tauri-plugin-positioner for positioning, click-through support, and display-change event listeners

entries.title: fix-duplicate-process-single-instance
entries.summary: Implemented single-instance enforcement for SpeakEasy using Tauri's single-instance plugin, preventing duplicate app launches from autostart or manual launches.
entries.problem: Two SpeakEasy.exe processes appeared due to autostart and manual launch, causing duplicate app instances and resource waste.
entries.fix: Integrated tauri-plugin-single-instance, handled --minimized flag for system tray autostart, and tested all launch scenarios to verify only one process remains at any time.

entries.title: fix-wrapup-slash-command
entries.summary: Fixed wrapup slash command by moving it from .cursor/prompts to .cursor/commands
entries.problem: Slash command /wrapup was not recognized by Cursor
entries.fix: Moved wrapup.md to correct directory .cursor/commands/ where Cursor reads slash commands

entries.title: enhance-wrapup-auto-restart-search
entries.summary: Enhanced wrapup system with automatic dev server restart detection and JSON-based searchable lessons learned index

entries.title: create-wrapup-sop-system
entries.summary: Created automated end-of-task workflow with quality gates, secret scanning, lessons-learned docs, and slash command integration

entries.title: add-wrapup-sop
entries.summary: Added automated end-of-task workflow with quality gates, secret scanning, and lessons-learned generation

entries.title: add-strict-rust-checking
entries.summary: Enhanced wrapup script with smart Rust checking (auto-detects Cargo.toml, treats warnings as errors). Cleaned up 8 dead code items from Rust codebase. Wrapup now enforces quality across frontend AND backend.
entries.problem: Wrapup script only checked frontend; Rust warnings were accumulating (11 warnings)
entries.fix: Added conditional cargo check with RUSTFLAGS=-D warnings, auto-detects src-tauri/Cargo.toml, added --skip-rust flag. Removed unused code: OverlayStatePayload, GptUsage::calculate_cost, HotkeyListener, has_api_key, and unused fields

entries.title: add-dev-restart-and-json-index
entries.summary: Added dev server auto-restart and searchable JSON index for lessons learned

entries.title: Fixed Model Selector API Key Storage
entries.summary: Model selector wasn't working because API keys weren't persisting. Root cause: keyring crate missing windows-native feature flag in Cargo.toml. Also fixed silent error swallowing in get_api_key_status and added comprehensive logging. Added UI improvements: clear labels separating Whisper vs Transform keys, auto-refresh on dropdown focus with 30s cache, and better error messages.

entries.title: Fixed Model Selector API Key Storage and Git Setup
entries.summary: Model selector wasn't working because: 1) keyring crate missing windows-native feature in Cargo.toml, 2) silent error swallowing in get_api_key_status, 3) no git identity configured preventing commits. Fixed all issues, added comprehensive logging, improved UI labels separating Whisper vs Transform keys, added auto-refresh with caching, and completed initial git commit.
